rows.notes: Pounds/shillings/pence shown clearly as '18.0.0' to the left of the description. Description handwriting for the name is slightly unclear ('Sre' vs 'Ste'/'Mr'), so confidence <1.0 for the text but numeric columns are unambiguous and valid.

rows.english_description: Augmentation received from Sir Thewin for three years.

rows.notes: Right-hand monetary columns aligned to this row read '17 13 4'. The description is mostly legible though the first word could be read a couple of ways ('Ladlane' vs 'Ladlane/Ladlané'); numeric alignment with vertical ruling is clear so amounts are reliable.
rows.section_header: Credlington Augm. red ad Fest. Purificatiōs

rows.description: Reed of mr Hutchins senr. Bursar for increments
rows.notes: Right-hand columns read '20. 3. 4' with a small loop/mark after the pence interpreted as 'ob' (halfpenny). The wording 'Reed of mr Hutchins senr. Bursar for increments' is legible; fraction recognition is slightly uncertain but the loop is consistent with a halfpenny mark.
rows.english_description: Received from Mr. Hutchins, Senior Bursar, for increments.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Received from Mr. Hutchins, Senior Bursar, for increments, amounting to £20 3s 4½d.
